reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: No comment provided in the thread.

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch series simplifies the kernel's memory management by removing fake head pages, which are no longer needed after a previous commit eliminated them. The changes include dropping unnecessary infrastructure such as page_fixed_fake_head(), page_is_fake_head(), and RCU read_lock in page_ref_add_unless(). This reduces complexity and overhead in hot paths like compound_head() and page_ref_add_unless().
